laws.title: Contempt of Congress Act
laws.status_basis: Chronology resolves this law as superseded before codification: Pub. L. 31-228 later repealed Public Law 16-112 and reinstated 2 U.S.C. 192 in full, so the law should remain history only.

provisions.text_summary: Historical note only; later law repealed the enactment and reinstated 2 U.S.C. 192 in full.
provisions.exact_change: Pub. L. 31-228 repealed Public Law 16-112 and reinstated 2 U.S.C. 192 in full.

current_implementation.detail: The current XML note and the migration report both treat the enactment as superseded, with the later contempt rule occupying the operative history.

laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch adds rp-pl016112-codification in usc/usc02.xml; origin/main did not show the matching note id.
laws.recommended_action: Retain the supersession history and leave the reinstated 2 U.S.C. 192 operative reference in place.
